keep_optional_when: Any required artifact, archived benchmark precondition, or rollback document is missing.
The Task 5.3 provenance fields or benchmark precondition hashes are missing or inconsistent.
The benchmark bundle cannot be machine-checked against the reviewed runtime smoke report.
reject_candidate_when: The evidence bundle is complete, but inference_smoke.json or scripts/local_adapter_smoke.ps1 is non-passing.
The benchmark smoke precondition is present but non-passing.
The benchmark bundle violates a threshold in this contract.
The local_adapter condition performs worse than retrieval_only on a required comparison rule.
ready_for_formal_promotion_review_when: The archived benchmark precondition matches the reviewed runtime smoke report.
The benchmark bundle includes retrieval_only control data and required primary datasets.
A dated promotion decision can cite this manifest plus the named rollback docs without changing the baseline runtime.
decision_rule.promotion_note: A passing bundle does not auto-promote local_adapter to Supported. Promotion still requires a dated decision record and updates to the capability registry and operator docs.
